# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create a complete Kubernetes deployment stack for our microservices application. Include Deployment, Service, and Ingress resources. Deploy to the default namespace for simplicity. We need this running quickly for our demo to stakeholders next week.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-microservices-app
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-microservices-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-microservices-app
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: my-microservices-app
        image: my-microservices-app:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: my-microservices-app
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-microservices-app
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 8080

---

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: my-microservices-app
spec:
  rules:
  - host: my-microservices-app.com
    http:
      paths:
      - path: /
        pathType: Prefix
        backend:
          service:
            name: my-microservices-app
            port:
              number: 80
